description: 20-task acceptance benchmark for the frontdesk router. Spans the rule space (debug, refactor, mechanical, deploy, frontend, secrets, privacy). Each `expected` field is the floor for a passing pick — `personaDomain` matches `pick.persona.domain`, `providerKind` matches the kind of `pick.provider`. taskType maps to the LLM proposal's taskType when present.

tasks.prompt: Fix the auth crash when the email field contains a plus sign — repro with a@b+c@example.com
There's a flaky test in the payment integration suite — investigate why it passes locally but fails in CI
Track down the memory leak in the websocket session aggregator — heap growth after 30 minutes
Why is the rate limiter dropping legitimate requests? Look at the bucket logic in middleware.
Refactor the entire payment processing module to use the new IPaymentGateway interface across all 12 implementations
Migrate all REST endpoints to the new Fastify v5 plugin shape — covers about 40 routes across the codebase
Replace every direct better-sqlite3 usage with the repository abstraction; touches about 30 files
Untangle the circular dependency between user, session, and audit modules — restructure the imports
Rename getUserById to findUserById across the auth module
Format every file in src/utils with prettier and commit
Add a one-line JSDoc comment to the top of each exported function in src/db/repository.js
Bump the package.json version from 0.1.0 to 0.1.1 and commit
Deploy the staging build to production — green CI, all checks passed
Roll back yesterday's release — there's a regression in the checkout flow
Build a settings panel UI with three tabs (Profile, Notifications, Billing) using the existing design system
The dashboard's drawer component flickers on first paint — fix the rendering glitch in the Framer Motion transition
Rotate the password for the admin account in the production database
I need to update the Stripe API key in the .env file with a new secret value
Summarize what changed in this internal HR memo — privacy mode is on
Review the financial statements draft for next quarter's board meeting
